sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37646" key="e)cou/rhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξούρ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n37646.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">passing with the urine,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">αἵματος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap.
